faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before immersing yourself in the L-SPA experience.

stillDoubts.title: Still have questions?
stillDoubts.subtitle: We are just one click away to advise you in a personalized way.

questions.ritualIncludes: What does my ritual or experience include?
questions.ritualIncludesAnswer: Each ritual includes a curated sequence of wet areas, therapeutic massages, botanical exfoliations, and nourishing masks. The exact details are found in each service description in our digital catalog and are attached to your reservation confirmation.
questions.accompaniedAnswer: Absolutely. We have private suites specifically designed for couple rituals, as well as social areas for group experiences and corporate wellness events.
questions.bringItems: Do I need to bring anything for my reservation?
questions.bringItemsAnswer: We only require that you bring your swimwear and comfortable footwear. L-SPA provides silk robes, high GSM towels, personalized sandals, and biometric security lockers.
questions.arrivalTimeAnswer: To fully immerse yourself in the L-SPA atmosphere, we recommend arriving 20 minutes before your appointment. This will allow you to complete the check-in process unhurriedly and enjoy our welcome infusion.
questions.foodAllowedAnswer: It's not necessary. We offer a select menu of hydration, organic teas, and courtesy glasses depending on the chosen plan. Outside food or beverages are not permitted to preserve the sensory purity of the environment.
questions.parkingAnswer: We offer free private parking with 24/7 security for all our guests during their stay at the spa.
questions.minorsAllowedAnswer: Our experiences are optimized for adults. However, we accept young people from 16 years old as long as they are under the direct supervision of a responsible adult throughout the visit.

footer.description: Your well-being and relaxation refuge. Experts in massages, facial treatments, and personal care.
